title: KOLPIA COUNSELING SERVICES - 211info
text: KOLPIA COUNSELING SERVICES KOLPIA COUNSELING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient substance use disorder counseling, mental health counseling, education, an integrative recovery program, and information about and referrals to Medically Assisted Treatment (MAT) services. Does not prescribe or dispense medication. 370 E Hersey Street Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Age 14 and older Hours: Office hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: By appointment only, times vary (541) 482-1718 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 482-1718 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP and discounted and sliding-scale fees are available. Accepts private insurance on a case-by-case basis. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Drug Use Disorder Education/Prevention DUI Offender Programs Individual Counseling Integrated Co-Occurring Disorders Treatment Specialized Information and Referral * Substance Use Disorder Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
